ticket.subject: Important Follow Up : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration
ticket.raw_subject: Important Follow Up : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration
ticket.description:
Good afternoon, Abhilash,

 

I’m wondering if I can get your assistance with a Canpar client who uses your platform. The client is Vape Wolinak (45400042) and your support team helped them with their duplicate Canpar manifesting issues last November of 2025.

 

The same client is now required to utilize Adult Signature (SA) requirements on every shipment. Is this part of the current version or implementation you offer through PluginHive?

 

I recall your Dev team had to do a version implementation last year for the manifest endOfday fix. The Plugin version 2.1.1 was the latest version available at that time.

 

Please review the attached Canpar Supplemental Updates (release date October 2023) and confirm that you have these options available to Canpar clients onboarding with PlugInHive.

 

 

Thanks for your consideration.

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

From: Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Sent: Tuesday, March 3, 2026 1:31 AM
To: Andre Young <ayoung@canpar.com>
Cc: vimal <vimal@pluginhive.com>; Srishti Negi <SNegi@canpar.com>
Subject: Re: Approved : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Hi Andre, 

 

Thank you for the approval to list PluginHive on the Canpar website. 

 

Please find attached our logo in .PNG format, sized in line with the other eCommerce tools displayed. 

 

 

Let me know if you need any adjustments.

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive__;!!DHZbxSM!CnRNoKDA14iGvw5ELMUVPz9K_MDTOXWXvjwP_kyUBO21wZq3faXyTUr1gDaiBmWfTaQePNJ3wjBDzuYAzwA$)



On 2 Mar 2026, at 10:35 PM, Andre Young <ayoung@canpar.com> wrote:

 

Good morning, Abhilash,

 

Our VP of Sales has approved the request to promote your PlugInHive logo on the Canpar website under E-Commerce tools. However, we will need you to provide your logo in .PNG format and at a comparable size to the other samples on our website.

 

 

https://www.canpar.com/en/solutions/ecommerce_tools.htm

 

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

<image001.png>

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

From: Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 12, 2026 12:24 AM
To: Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com>
Cc: vimal <vimal@pluginhive.com>; Chris Krupey <Chris.Krupey@loomis-express.com>; Veena <veena@pluginhive.com>
Subject: Re: External : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Hi Andre,  

 

Thank you for following up. 

 

Please find below the feature support details for PluginHive with Canpar integration: 

 

* Multi-piece label printing: Yes 
* DIM weight calculations: We pass both weight and dimensions in the request; the higher of actual weight or dimensional weight will be considered 
* Freight charges listing separate freight charge + tax (with & without) equaling a Subtotal and final Total Charges: No 
* Option for RETURN label printing: No 
* Thermal (4 x 6) and Integrated (8.5 x 11) label printing options: Only thermal (4 x 6) is supported 

 

I’d also like to kindly assure you that our support team is available 24×5 with partial coverage on weekends, and our technical team is always working on new features to make merchants’ shipping processes simpler and more efficient. 

 

Regarding the case you mentioned, it was indeed a rare situation. We always aim to deliver features promptly, and any new or missing feature requested by customers is addressed on time. Additionally, if you see any improvements or enhancements to our solution that could help our mutual customers, we would be happy to make them available. 

 

Please let me know if you’d like a brief demo or any additional clarification on these features.

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive__;!!DHZbxSM!HEH8p8FSsaVvBzUl8rqSLheOQfhVHYKC9NB8Vh6BuRLem4B4vhnAxT3tw3ap5aGfWSvACdfdNsNKB-TRrB4$)




On 10 Feb 2026, at 7:19 PM, Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com> wrote:

 

Hello again, Abhilash,

 

Just a follow up to add from our sales management team who are seeking confirmation that the following features are available through PluginHive

 

Do you provide and support these features that are a required for Canpar clients?

 

* Multi-piece label printing
* DIM weight calculations
* Freight charges listing separate freight charge + tax (with & without) equaling a Subtotal and final Total Charges
* Option for RETURN label printing
* Thermal (4 X 6) and Integrated (8.5 X 11) label printing options

 

 

Thanks,

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

<image001.png>

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

From: Andre Young
Sent: Tuesday, February 10, 2026 8:40 AM
To: 'Abhilash S' <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Cc: vimal <vimal@pluginhive.com>; Chris Krupey <Chris.Krupey@loomis-express.com>
Subject: External : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

Good morning, Abhilash,

 

Before we give consent to your proposal for website promotion, I do have a concern regarding the manifest endOfday issue from August 2025 that impacted one of Canpar clients. The client Vape Wolinak (45400042) encountered duplication of manifest transactions that we had to manually correct over a 2-month period.

 

Your development team took 3-months to resolve. We are hoping this was an isolated incident and not the norm for client support complaints. I have outlined the timeline below.

 

 

Looking forward to your response.

 

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

<image001.png>

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

 

 

Cedric Beraud

Nov 21, 2025, 19:52 GMT+5:30

Hi Touseef,

 

I haven’t received any feedback from the client indicating there were duplicates. If I hear anything, I’ll let you know right away.

 

Have a nice day!

 

CÉDRIC

BÉRAUD

Développeur Web, stratège numérique et associé

TROIS-RIVIÈRES

819 840-2757

#230 (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/support.pluginhive.com/tickets/230__;!!DHZbxSM!HksLblUnePwQKHAkBm-UHr0WM3ujHP6TN09r-DHzBDRfW5Tx-jnaUEtg3FZsKF32VBuqF7Nl8SBbQRjcow$)

BÉCANCOUR

819 233-9688

#230 (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/support.pluginhive.com/tickets/230__;!!DHZbxSM!HksLblUnePwQKHAkBm-UHr0WM3ujHP6TN09r-DHzBDRfW5Tx-jnaUEtg3FZsKF32VBuqF7Nl8SBbQRjcow$)

SHAWINIGAN

819 537-5121

#230 (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/support.pluginhive.com/tickets/230__;!!DHZbxSM!HksLblUnePwQKHAkBm-UHr0WM3ujHP6TN09r-DHzBDRfW5Tx-jnaUEtg3FZsKF32VBuqF7Nl8SBbQRjcow$)

SANS FRAIS

1 866 293-8688 

ADNCOMM.COM (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/cloud.letsignit.com/collect/bc/6579c6a8e9b3e2f9af67a058?p=FaCzD0dwEHFsrNhzb3wIeiaPbZM52asAVagSVob7MY8taSxTLfwSXCgwyIp_2vxKAAb2Tyb2-US3KS8o8ceWPnuWTqQf2fwhq4JhiCThMZ7n8XKCCVn5MQKZqTHjVx6GzOmQpvKVFDpe6IGJCwZnrjtL-AqsXBmI0hjvPXhmRiY=__;!!DHZbxSM!HksLblUnePwQKHAkBm-UHr0WM3ujHP6TN09r-DHzBDRfW5Tx-jnaUEtg3FZsKF32VBuqF7Nl8SD68MI9Ww$)

 

 

Touseef (PluginHive)

Oct 20, 2025, 23:49 GMT+5:30

Hello Cedric,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
I would like to once again clarify that the Order Fulfillment action has no maximum order limit. You can use the Today's Labels feature in the plugin and select all the batches for the day in one go and fulfill them together at the end of your business day.
 
The 150 Orders limit message you see is only for printing the labels and not for fulfillment. You can select any number of orders in batches and fulfill them with the plugin in one attempt.
 
I have also relayed your response to our team and we will update you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

 

 

 

Andre

Aug 28, 2025, 21:55 GMT+5:30

Good morning, Sibi,

 

I had the pleasure of working with your Plugin-Hive developer team back in 2022-2023 to add Canpar as a carrier on the platform. Our mutual clientVape Wolinak is experiencing some transaction duplication that is occurring only during the manifest endOfDay close.

 

Reportedly, automatic endOfDay API requests are being sent on the same date for as many as 13-14 manifests within minutes apart.

 

The Canpar API specifications only require 1 single endOfDay call prior to the next nearest Midnight. Please help us understand how the Woocommerce plugin and Plugin-Hive utilize the manifest functionality for Canpar client account transactions. Please clarify purpose of multiple manifest closes per shipment transactions.

 

If you are not the intended recipient for “developer” support, then please connect me with that team to further the inquiry.

 

 

Looking forward to your feedback.

 

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

 

 

 

From: Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Sent: Monday, February 9, 2026 1:36 AM
To: Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com>
Cc: IT Service Desk <Servicedesk@canpar.com>; vimal <vimal@pluginhive.com>
Subject: Re: Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Hi Andre,  

 

Thank you for the update. I appreciate you forwarding the proposal to your Sales and Marketing team. 

 

Please let me know if there’s any additional information we can share in the meantime. 

 

I look forward to hearing from you when there’s an update. 

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive__;!!DHZbxSM!HFMoTvnvgWnSHLBCX5yk-DOGOe6GsHMMlkVswwThX9EFuvwcGT1piBBqppIvRxRR0-anWTC7_ys31c8mqpA$)

 

On 6 Feb 2026, at 9:02 PM, Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com> wrote:

 

Good morning, Abhilash,

 

I have forwarded your proposal to our Sales and Marketing team for review. I will keep you posted if I get any updates.

 

 

Thanks,

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

<image001.png>

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

 

From: Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Sent: Friday, February 6, 2026 12:31 AM
To: IT Service Desk <servicedesk@canpar.com>
Cc: Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com>
Subject: Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

Hello Canpar Team, 

 

I’m Abhilash, Partnership Manager at PluginHive. We provide shipping automation solutions for eCommerce merchants on platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, PrestaShop, BigCommerce, & other eCommerce platforms. 

 

We currently support Canpar services, and the integration is live and working successfully. Merchants using PluginHive can automate their Canpar shipping workflows, including bulk label generation and order fulfillment, directly from their store—helping them save time and effort. 

 

We noticed the eCommerce tools listed on your website (https://www.canpar.com/en/solutions/ecommerce_tools.htm) and wanted to kindly ask if PluginHive could be included in this list as a supported integration. This would help Canpar customers easily discover an automation solution for their shipping needs. 

 

If needed, we’d be happy to set up a quick call to walk you through the integration and understand the next steps. 

 

Thank you for your time and consideration. We look forward to hearing from you.

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn (https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive__;!!DHZbxSM!ER-dlvzOlA0pl7v42oaEb-7lJnNwnnonaZddN7ClRSrRx6Y0Ju1NiiWrm8kBpnYBNW3fjeIUbB8tadPD4Kc$)

comments.html_body:
Good afternoon, Abhilash,

 

I’m wondering if I can get your assistance with a Canpar client who uses your platform. The client is Vape Wolinak (45400042) and your support team helped them with their duplicate Canpar manifesting issues last November of 2025.

 

The same client is now required to utilize Adult Signature (SA) requirements on every shipment. Is this part of the current version or implementation you offer through PluginHive?

 

I recall your Dev team had to do a version implementation last year for the manifest endOfday fix. The Plugin version 2.1.1 was the latest version available at that time.

 

Please review the attached Canpar Supplemental Updates (release date October 2023) and confirm that you have these options available to Canpar clients onboarding with PlugInHive.

 

 

Thanks for your consideration.

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

 

 

Canpar Transport / Loomis-Express / ICS Courier

A TransForce Company

P. (905)499-2661

 

A TransForce Company

From: Abhilash S <abhilash@pluginhive.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 12, 2026 12:24 AM
To: Andre Young <AYoung@canpar.com>

Subject: Re: External : Incident# 40239 : Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.

Hi Andre,  

 

Thank you for following up. 

 

Please find below the feature support details for PluginHive with Canpar integration: 

 

  • Multi-piece label printing: Yes 
  • DIM weight calculations: We pass both weight and dimensions in the request; the higher of actual weight or dimensional weight will be considered 
  • Freight charges listing separate freight charge + tax (with & without) equaling a Subtotal and final Total Charges: No 
  • Option for RETURN label printing: No 
  • Thermal (4 x 6) and Integrated (8.5 x 11) label printing options: Only thermal (4 x 6) is supported 

 

I’d also like to kindly assure you that our support team is available 24×5 with partial coverage on weekends, and our technical team is always working on new features to make merchants’ shipping processes simpler and more efficient. 

 

Regarding the case you mentioned, it was indeed a rare situation. We always aim to deliver features promptly, and any new or missing feature requested by customers is addressed on time. Additionally, if you see any improvements or enhancements to our solution that could help our mutual customers, we would be happy to make them available. 

 

Please let me know if you’d like a brief demo or any additional clarification on these features.

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

Hello Cedric,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
I would like to once again clarify that the Order Fulfillment action has no maximum order limit. You can use the Today's Labels feature in the plugin and select all the batches for the day in one go and fulfill them together at the end of your business day.
 
The 150 Orders limit message you see is only for printing the labels and not for fulfillment. You can select any number of orders in batches and fulfill them with the plugin in one attempt.
 
I have also relayed your response to our team and we will update you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

 

 

 

Andre

Aug 28, 2025, 21:55 GMT+5:30

Good morning, Sibi,

 

I had the pleasure of working with your Plugin-Hive developer team back in 2022-2023 to add Canpar as a carrier on the platform. Our mutual clientVape Wolinak is experiencing some transaction duplication that is occurring only during the manifest endOfDay close.

 

Reportedly, automatic endOfDay API requests are being sent on the same date for as many as 13-14 manifests within minutes apart.

 

The Canpar API specifications only require 1 single endOfDay call prior to the next nearest Midnight. Please help us understand how the Woocommerce plugin and Plugin-Hive utilize the manifest functionality for Canpar client account transactions. Please clarify purpose of multiple manifest closes per shipment transactions.

 

If you are not the intended recipient for “developer” support, then please connect me with that team to further the inquiry.

 

 

Looking forward to your feedback.

 

 

 

Andre Young

IT Manager | Field Services

Subject: Request to List PluginHive as a Canpar eCommerce Integration

 

Hello Canpar Team, 

 

I’m Abhilash, Partnership Manager at PluginHive. We provide shipping automation solutions for eCommerce merchants on platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, PrestaShop, BigCommerce, & other eCommerce platforms. 

 

We currently support Canpar services, and the integration is live and working successfully. Merchants using PluginHive can automate their Canpar shipping workflows, including bulk label generation and order fulfillment, directly from their store—helping them save time and effort. 

 

We noticed the eCommerce tools listed on your website (https://www.canpar.com/en/solutions/ecommerce_tools.htm) and wanted to kindly ask if PluginHive could be included in this list as a supported integration. This would help Canpar customers easily discover an automation solution for their shipping needs. 

 

If needed, we’d be happy to set up a quick call to walk you through the integration and understand the next steps. 

 

Thank you for your time and consideration. We look forward to hearing from you.

 

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

comments.body:
Hi Andre,

Thank you for reaching out and for sharing the details.

We understand the importance of this requirement for your client and are treating this as a priority. Regarding the Adult Signature (SA) requirement, this is not currently supported as part of our standard Canpar integration. At present, we support enabling or disabling signature requirements by default. That said, Adult Signature support is already planned and is in our development pipeline. This feature will be available in the app soon, and once released, all customers will be able to use it based on their business requirements.

Regarding the other features mentioned in the deck, we support the majority of the features that have been requested or required by most businesses so far. Going forward, if there are any additional requirements, we will work towards making them available as quickly as possible. Additionally, please let us know if there are any major features you have in mind that you’d like us to specifically review or cross-check from our end.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn
